Configure TypeScript, set up the Vite config skeleton, and confirm nx build browser-extension runs without errors.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"travis@modernmachine.io","created_at":"2026-03-13T00:39:56Z","created_by":"Travis Daudelin","updated_at":"2026-03-13T00:39:56Z"}

Scaffolded apps/browser-extension with @nx/react, Vite, TypeScript, ESLint. nx lint and nx build both pass.

old_value: {"id":"personal-password-manager-3s9","title":"Scaffold empty libs/core and libs/shared with module boundary rules","description":"Generate placeholder libs/core and libs/shared libraries using @nx/js. Configure @nx/enforce-module-boundaries ESLint rule to enforce that apps can import from libs, but libs/shared cannot import from libs/core, etc. Establishes the import boundary architecture before any real code is written.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"travis@modernmachine.io","created_at":"2026-03-13T00:40:29Z","created_by":"Travis Daudelin","updated_at":"2026-03-13T00:40:29Z"}

new_value: Scaffolded libs/core (scope:core) and libs/shared (scope:shared) with @nx/js. Updated depConstraints in root .eslintrc.json to enforce app→core/shared, core→shared, shared→nothing. nx lint passes across all 3 projects.

old_value: {"id":"personal-password-manager-oua","title":"Configure vite-plugin-web-extension for MV3 multi-entry-point build","description":"Install and configure vite-plugin-web-extension in apps/browser-extension. Confirm the plugin correctly drives the build from manifest.json.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"travis@modernmachine.io","created_at":"2026-03-13T00:40:03Z","created_by":"Travis Daudelin","updated_at":"2026-03-13T00:40:03Z"}

new_value: Installed vite-plugin-web-extension and webextension-polyfill. Updated vite.config.mts to use the plugin with src/manifest.json. Created MV3 manifest with popup, background service worker, and content script entry points. nx build produces all 3 chunks plus manifest.json.
